title: Add approval prompts for policy-blocked high-risk runtime actions
summary: Add approval prompts for policy-blocked high-risk runtime actions
acceptanceCriteria: Runtime policy decisions are evaluated before worker execution.
Policy decisions produce audit records and retry/cost metadata.
High-risk actions can produce approval prompts instead of live execution.
reviewNotes: Implemented in the Hermes OS native command, task-generation, dashboard, persistence, scheduled review, runtime policy, template registry, and execution-readiness work already recorded in docs/hermes-os-integration-log.md.
